Description

Description

Sofia 20x20" square pillow features a modern medallion motif with decorative grey embroidery on an off white background. Perfect for your top of bed or as an accent piece in your living room. Hypoallergenic polyester filling in removable cover. So it is easy to spot clean or hand wash the pillow cove, line dry.
